LandingHero.subtitle: Tested secondary-market controllers, drives, pendants and reducers for discontinued automation - located, verified and quoted in hours, not weeks.
LandingHero.searchLabel: Drop the part number off your faulty unit

LandingSections.hostStrip: Parts salvaged from & verified to fit every major platform
LandingSections.howTitle: From breakdown to a tested part in hand.
LandingSections.howLead: A request-for-quote loop built for emergencies - not a checkout cart that quotes you a part nobody has in stock.

1.title: Paste the part number
1.desc: Search the alphanumeric code off your faulty unit - exactly how you'd Google it.

2.title: Request a quote
2.desc: No cart, no payment. Flag line-down or spares, pick a channel, hit send.

3.title: We source it
3.desc: Our desk works a verified China supply network to locate and bench-test the part.

4.title: Tested part ships
4.desc: Approve the quote and it ships with a 6-month functional warranty.

LandingSections.sourceTitle: Five tiers of high-demand automation parts.
LandingSections.whyTitle: Built for the engineer with a stopped production line.

guarantee.title: Verified-refurb guarantee
guarantee.desc: Every unit is bench-tested and ships with a 6-month functional warranty. No payment until you approve the quote.

speed.title: Quotes in under 2 hours
speed.desc: A live sourcing desk, not an inbox. Flag a line-down emergency and it jumps the queue.

rfq.title: RFQ-first sourcing
rfq.desc: No public cart pricing. We confirm availability, testing status, lead time and quote after checking the exact part.

compat.title: Cross-compatibility checked
compat.desc: Each part is mapped to the host controllers and the robot arms it drives, so you order with confidence.

LandingSections.confidenceTitle: Confirm the right part before you buy.
LandingSections.confidenceLead: Legacy automation parts are messy: superseded models, repair-only stock, and compatibility traps. We keep the catalog focused on identification and RFQ so your quote is checked against the exact controller, robot model, and urgency.
LandingSections.emergencyText: Skip the form. Message our sourcing desk on WhatsApp with your part number and we'll start hunting immediately.
LandingSections.startLead: Drop it in and we'll tell you what we can source, what it costs, and how fast it ships.

Catalog.heroSubtitle: Verified secondary-market controllers, drives, pendants and reducers for decommissioned FANUC, ABB, KUKA, Yaskawa & Siemens systems. Drop your part number - we locate, test, and quote.
Catalog.partsDemand: {count} parts · prioritized by live search demand
Catalog.noMatchTitle: No indexed match - but we can still source it.
Catalog.noMatchText: Submit the part number and our team will hunt it across our China supply network.
Catalog.noFilterMatch: No catalog results match the selected filters.
Catalog.clearFiltersHint: Clear one filter or search by exact part number.
